scenarios.capability: Read and summarize a web article using defuddle with --md flag instead of WebFetch
scenarios.reason: Agent can run defuddle parse with --md and produce a markdown summary from the output.

scenarios.capability: Save a documentation page to a local file using defuddle with -o flag
scenarios.reason: Agent can run defuddle parse with --md and -o to write content to a local file.

scenarios.capability: Extract only metadata (title and description) from a web page using -p flag
scenarios.reason: Agent can run defuddle parse with -p title and -p description to extract targeted metadata.

scenarios.capability: Recognize a login-gated URL and fall back appropriately instead of blindly running defuddle
scenarios.reason: Agent should identify auth-gated URLs from context and avoid running defuddle, providing an appropriate fallback or explanation.
